verdicts.claim: Campbell River Youth Basketball Association (Campbell River Steve Nash Youth Basketball) — principal="" phone="250-286-1161" email="RecandCulture@campbellriver.ca"
verdicts.evidence: Both contacts verified real via campbellriver.ca and BC 211: 250-286-1161 is the City of Campbell River Community Centre line, and RecandCulture@campbellriver.ca is the City Parks, Recreation & Culture department email. However, these are generic MUNICIPAL Rec & Culture contacts (the dept that administers SNYB), not a dedicated line for the association, which operates its own Facebook page (facebook.com/CampbellRiverSteveNashYouthBasketball). Principal correctly left blank — none listed.
verdicts.correction: Contacts are real but are the City of Campbell River Recreation & Culture department's general contacts (Community Centre 250-286-1161 + RecandCulture@campbellriver.ca), not an association-specific line. Acceptable as a routing contact; not the club's own.

verdicts.claim: Kamloops Hoops (Kamloops) — principal="Ryan Kerr, Founder" phone="250.819.4335" email="ryan@kamloopshoops.com"
verdicts.evidence: kamloopshoops.com/contact page lists 'Ryan Kerr: ryan@kamloopshoops.com, 250.819.4335' exactly. Founder role independently confirmed by the club's About page and CFJC Today news coverage (Ryan Kerr started Kamloops Hoops in 2012). All three fields match.

verdicts.claim: Panther Hoops (Port Coquitlam) — principal="Doug Dowell, Founder and President" phone="(236) 428-3865" email="info@pantherhoops.ca"
verdicts.evidence: Phone (236) 428-3865 and email info@pantherhoops.ca confirmed via ZoomInfo company listing and pantherhoops.ca/contact. Doug Dowell as Founder & President of Panther Hoops Basketball Society independently confirmed via his LinkedIn (Panther Hoops International Prep) and Tri-City News coverage. Society runs programs across the Lower Mainland including Port Coquitlam.
verdicts.correction: Registered/HQ mailing address is #100-9339 200A Street, Langley Township, BC (not Port Coquitlam); Port Coquitlam is a program location, not the head office.

verdicts.claim: VK Basketball (North Vancouver) — principal="Anthony Beyrouti, Founder/CEO" phone="+1 604-283-2287" email="[email protected]"
verdicts.evidence: Anthony Beyrouti as Founder/CEO confirmed via vkbasketball.com/about, Front Office Sports profile, and North Shore News. Phone +1 604-283-2287 confirmed via independent directory (CanaGuide). BUT the email value is a scraping artifact: vkbasketball.com uses email obfuscation, and '[email protected]' is the masked placeholder, not a real address — the club's own site had no phone either (phone is directory-sourced only).
verdicts.correction: email should be "" — '[email protected]' is an obfuscation placeholder, not a valid address. Principal and phone stand.

verdicts.claim: Panther Hoops (Coquitlam) — principal="Doug Dowell, Founder and President" phone="(236) 428-3865" email="info@pantherhoops.ca"
verdicts.evidence: Duplicate of the Port Coquitlam entry — same organization (Panther Hoops Basketball Society) and same verified contacts. Phone (236) 428-3865 and info@pantherhoops.ca confirmed via ZoomInfo and pantherhoops.ca/contact; Doug Dowell Founder/President confirmed via LinkedIn and Tri-City News. Society is described as 'Panther Hoops Basketball Society, Coquitlam, BC' and runs programs there.
verdicts.correction: Same-org duplicate of the Port Coquitlam record; head office is in Langley Township. Coquitlam is a valid program/society location.

verdicts.claim: FV Prep (Abbotsford) — principal="Gavin Kular" phone="778-246-6496" email="FVPrep@gmail.com"
verdicts.evidence: fvprep.com/pages/contact-1 lists 'Gavin Kular, 778-246-6496, FVPrep@gmail.com' — all three fields match exactly. FV Prep is an Abbotsford, BC youth basketball training org. No formal title is stated on the page (claim asserts none), so principal name is confirmed as-is.

verdicts.claim: Delbrook Basketball Association (Delbrook Steve Nash Youth Basketball), North Vancouver: principal="Michael Bond", phone="", email="admin@delbrookbasketball.com"
verdicts.evidence: Org confirmed real: North Vancouver SNYB program, website delbrookbasketball.com, PO Box 805, 1641 Lonsdale Ave, North Vancouver BC V7M 2J5 (vancouversports.com, sportsengine.com, Facebook /DelbrookBasketball). The email admin@delbrookbasketball.com sits on the club's genuine domain. However, the name 'Michael Bond' appeared only in a single aggregated search snippet and could NOT be independently confirmed on any readable page — the Facebook page names no administrator, vancouversports.com lists no contact person, RocketReach 403'd, and the club's own site failed to load (SSL handshake failure).
verdicts.correction: Principal 'Michael Bond' is single-sourced and unverified; email is on the correct domain but also unconfirmed by an independent page.

verdicts.claim: Seymour Basketball Association (Seymour Steve Nash Youth Basketball), North Vancouver: principal="", phone="604-258-8934", email="Info@SeymourBasketball.com"
verdicts.evidence: The email domain seymourbasketball.com does NOT belong to the North Vancouver program — two independent fetches confirm it currently serves an unrelated Australian club: 'Seymour Basketball Association', Chittick Park, Pollard St, Seymour VIC 3660, contact basketballseymour@gmail.com. So Info@SeymourBasketball.com almost certainly does not reach the North Vancouver SNYB program. The phone 604-258-8934 (a genuine BC number) appears only on the vancouversports.com directory listing, which is the same record that carries the now-stale/Australian seymourbasketball.com website — making that record's provenance suspect.
verdicts.correction: Email Info@SeymourBasketball.com is invalid for this club — seymourbasketball.com is Seymour Basketball Association in Seymour, Victoria, Australia. Phone 604-258-8934 is a plausible North Vancouver number but rests on a single stale directory listing; treat as unverified.

verdicts.claim: Lloydminster Minor Basketball Association (a.k.a. Lloydminster Youth Basketball Inc.), Lloydminster: principal="", phone="306-307-8788", email=""
verdicts.evidence: The City of Lloydminster's official clubs directory (lloydminster.ca) attributes phone 306-307-8788 to 'Lloydminster Youth Basketball Club' — and lists NO 'Lloydminster Minor Basketball Association' at all (its 'Minor' associations are hockey/baseball/football). The prep file itself separately lists 'Lloydminster Youth Basketball Club Ltd.' as a distinct entry from 'Lloydminster Minor Basketball Association', so the claim's 'a.k.a.' equivalence conflates two different orgs. The number is a real Lloydminster youth-basketball contact, but its attribution to the 'Minor Basketball Association' is unverified.
verdicts.correction: Phone 306-307-8788 is officially listed under 'Lloydminster Youth Basketball Club', not 'Lloydminster Minor Basketball Association'; the two names may be different organizations.

verdicts.claim: Red Deer Minor Basketball Association (RDMBA), Red Deer: principal="Jillana Knauft, President", phone="", email="info@reddeerbball.ca"
verdicts.evidence: Principal independently confirmed: Jillana (Jill) Knauft is quoted as RDMBA Club President in 2024 news coverage (rdnewsnow.com 'Red Deer Minor Basketball now nationally verified', Red Deer Advocate). Domain reddeerbball.ca is the club's genuine site. Caveat: the specific address info@reddeerbball.ca was not independently corroborated — confirmed working role emails found are President@reddeerbball.ca, willhara@reddeerbball.ca, bethbergeron@reddeerbball.ca (plus reddeerbball@gmail.com).
verdicts.correction: Principal solid. Email info@reddeerbball.ca is on the correct domain but unverified; the confirmed presidential contact is President@reddeerbball.ca.

verdicts.claim: GTS Hoop Factory (Golden Ticket Sports Inc.), Lloydminster: principal="Chris King, Co-Owner", phone="780-214-1221", email="gtshoopfactory@gmail.com"
verdicts.evidence: Chris King confirmed as Co-Owner/Co-Founder of Golden Ticket Sports Inc. via multiple independent sources (goldenticketsports.com 'about/chris-king', gorustlers.ca coach bio, MooseJawToday and My Lloydminster Now news articles). Phone 780-214-1221 and email gtshoopfactory@gmail.com both listed on the club's own site gtshoopfactory.com, tied to Chris King. 780 area code is consistent with the Alberta side of Lloydminster.

verdicts.claim: Genesis Basketball (Calgary program), Calgary: principal="Eddie Richardson III, Founder/Director", phone="403-870-3420", email="Eddie@Genesisbasketball.net"
verdicts.evidence: Eddie Richardson (III) confirmed as founder (2007) and director/president of Genesis Basketball via independent sources: Avenue Calgary 'Top 40 Under 40' profile, 211 Alberta agency record, and LinkedIn ('Eddie Richardson III'). Phone 403-870-3420 and email Eddie@Genesisbasketball.net listed on the club's own genesisbasketball.net contact and 'Train with Eddie' pages. Calgary non-profit, ages 5-18.

verdicts.claim: [prior_updates_sample spot-check] West Island Outdoor Basketball League (WIOBL), Pierrefonds-Roxboro QC: principal="Stephen Hall, President", phone="(514) 626-6044", email="wioblstevehall@gmail.com", address="13136 Monk Blvd"
verdicts.evidence: Address 13136 rue Monk, Pierrefonds-Roxboro QC and phone (514) 626-6044 confirmed via wiobl.com and sportsengine/Facebook listings. Stephen 'Steve' Hall is confirmed as the league's public-facing lead (Twitter/X handle @WIOBLSTEVE), consistent with the email wioblstevehall@gmail.com. President title is consistent with all public references.

verdicts.claim: [prior_updates_sample spot-check] Tri-City Youth Basketball Association (TCYBA), Coquitlam BC: principal="Ross Tomlinson, Executive Director", phone="(604) 492-0565", email="registrar@tcyba.org"
verdicts.evidence: Ross Tomlinson confirmed as TCYBA Executive Director via the club's own announcement (tcyba.org/tcyba-blog 'TCYBA welcomes Ross Tomlinson as Executive Director') AND independent LinkedIn ('Executive Director at Tri-City Youth Basketball Association, VP Basketball BC'). Founded 1999, Tri-Cities BC, ~2000 players. registrar@tcyba.org is the association's registrar role-email (registrar is Lora Roy).

verdicts.claim: [prior_updates_sample spot-check] Passion Basketball Academy, Laval QC: principal="Paul Stephens, Founder/Owner", phone="514-913-8050", email="info@passionbasketball.ca"
verdicts.evidence: Paul Stephens confirmed as Owner/Founder via LinkedIn ('Owner, Passion Basketball') and passionbasketball.ca 'Our Story' (founded 2004). Phone 514-913-8050 (call/text) confirmed on passionbasketball.com contact page. Laval QC confirmed. Both passionbasketball.ca and passionbasketball.com are the club's domains.
verdicts.correction: Minor: the primary email advertised on the site is INFO@PASSIONBASKETBALL.COM; the sample's info@passionbasketball.ca uses the club's other legitimate domain — both plausibly valid.

verdicts.claim: [prior_updates_sample spot-check] ByFar Sports (Qulture Basket), Québec City: phone="581-300-3301", email="info@byfarsports.com", address="1330 Boulevard Père-Lelièvre, Québec, QC G1M 3P1"
verdicts.evidence: ByFar (ByFar Centre Sportif — Gym de Basketball et Fitness) confirmed at 1330 Bd Père-Lelièvre, Québec QC G1M 3P1 with phone 581-300-3301 and email info@byfarsports.com across multiple independent directories (playsport.com, admycity.ca, fitlynk, Facebook /BYFARGYM) and the club's own byfarsports.com. Address and G1M 3P1 postal code match the sample exactly.
verdicts.correction: The 'Qulture Basket' alias in the record name was not corroborated by any source; the facility is publicly branded 'ByFar Centre Sportif'.
